reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Michelle for my wedding, and I can't express how thrilled I am with the results! The photos are absolutely stunning; each one beautifully captures the essence of our special day.

From the very beginning, Michelle was incredibly detailed and direct in her approach, ensuring that every moment was planned out perfectly. Her professionalism and clear communication made everything flow smoothly, allowing us to enjoy our day without any worries.

What truly stood out was her ability to capture the love, happiness, and laughter that surrounded us. Every shot radiates joy and emotion, reflecting the spirit of our celebration. I am so grateful for her talent and dedication. She made our wedding day even more memorable, and I will cherish these photos for a lifetime. Highly recommend!

We are absolutely thrilled with the experience we had with Michelle Betz as our wedding photographer! She truly went above and beyond to make sure we got the most breathtaking and memorable pictures from our special day. Every photo is a testament to her incredible talent and attention to detail.

Not only is she a gifted photographer, but she is also incredibly sweet and personable, which made the whole process enjoyable and stress-free. She made us feel comfortable in front of the camera and captured the most genuine and heartfelt moments with such ease.

We couldn't be happier with the results and highly recommend Michelle to anyone looking for someone who will bring their vision to life with professionalism, warmth, and artistry!

Michelle was such an important piece of our wedding day and the photos she captured will be cherished for a lifetime! She’s incredibly kind, communicates very well, and she is very talented! If you’re searching for a photographer and you’re worried because you want the right kind of person to trust with your day, look no further. Michelle is your girl and she’s amazing. Also, the pricing is very fair and I got my photos back a lot quicker than expected- with sneak peeks even sooner! Thank you Michelle for perfectly capturing our special day 🫶🏼

I cannot say enough about how much we adore and appreciate Michelle. She went above and beyond to make our elopement exactly what we wanted. She was our biggest hype woman while also stepping back and allowing us to be in the moment and celebrate us. Cannot reccomend her enough!

Michelle is an amazing photographer and a sweetheart. We had a slightly unorthodox idea for our elopement and she was more than happy to travel and accommodate to made our day one we'll remember forever. She's incredibly easy to work with and she truly went above and beyond for us.
